ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., Mayor, Council) */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election associated with the race */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the race */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "cand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the candidate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race the candidate belongs to */,
  "incumbent" TEXT /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "candidate_status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "precinct_type" TEXT /* Type of the precinct (e.g., in-person, absentee) */,
  "polling_location" TEXT /* Location of the polling station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of the office (e.g., executive, legislative) */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election record the vote belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the vote was cast for */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of the vote (e.g., in-person, absentee) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("cand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the election official */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the election official */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record that was modified */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
